examples.target: The dog became {aggressive} when it felt threatened.
He has an {aggressive} sales approach.
She found his {aggressive} tone rude.
Being {aggressive} at work can damage your reputation.
examples.source: İşte saldırgan olmak itibarınıza zarar verebilir.

examples.target: He is too {arrogant} to listen to other people's ideas.
Her {arrogant} attitude made her unpopular.
examples.source: Kibirli tavrı onu sevilmez biri haline getirdi.

examples.target: The new manager seemed {arrogant} at first.
Don't be {arrogant} — there is always something to learn.
examples.source: Kibirli olma — her zaman öğrenecek bir şeyler vardır.

examples.target: The old town has a {charming} atmosphere.
examples.source: Eski şehrin büyüleyici bir atmosferi var.

examples.target: She has a {charming} smile that everyone loves.
examples.source: Herkesin sevdiği büyüleyici bir gülüşü var.

examples.target: He is very {charming} at social events.
The {charming} hotel was a perfect getaway.
examples.source: Büyüleyici otel mükemmel bir tatil yeri.

examples.target: She always seems {cheerful} even on hard days.
examples.source: Zor günlerde bile her zaman neşeli görünür.

examples.target: A {cheerful} attitude makes a big difference.
examples.source: Neşeli bir tavır büyük fark yaratır.

examples.target: The children were {cheerful} at the birthday party.
He greeted everyone with a {cheerful} 'good morning!'
It was {considerate} of you to call and check in.
A {considerate} neighbor never makes noise at night.
examples.source: Düşünceli bir komşu geceleri gürültü yapmaz.

examples.target: He is always {considerate} of other people's feelings.
Be {considerate} of your colleagues in the shared office.
examples.source: Ortak ofiste iş arkadaşlarınıza karşı düşünceli olun.

examples.target: English is the {dominant} language in global business.
examples.source: İngilizce küresel iş dünyasında hakim dildir.

examples.target: The {dominant} player in the market set the prices.
She had a {dominant} personality in the group.
The {dominant} team won the championship again.
Good doctors show {empathy} toward their patients.
examples.source: İyi doktorlar hastalarına karşı empati gösterir.

examples.target: She listened with {empathy} to her friend's problems.
{Empathy} is the ability to understand others' feelings.
Teachers with {empathy} connect better with students.
examples.source: Empati sahibi öğretmenler öğrencilerle daha iyi bağ kurar.

examples.target: She is very {generous} with her time and money.
He made a {generous} donation to the shelter.
It was {generous} of them to offer help.
A {generous} spirit makes the world a better place.
examples.source: Cömert bir ruh dünyayı daha iyi bir yer yapar.

examples.target: Despite her success, she remained {humble}.
Be {humble} enough to admit when you are wrong.
examples.source: Yanıldığında kabul edecek kadar alçakgönüllü ol.

examples.target: He is a {humble} man who never brags.
A {humble} attitude earns more respect than arrogance.
examples.source: Alçakgönüllü bir tavır kibire göre daha fazla saygı kazandırır.

examples.target: She made an {impulsive} decision to quit her job.
examples.source: İşini bırakmak için ani bir karar verdi.

examples.target: He is too {impulsive} and often regrets his actions.
examples.source: Çok dürtüsel davranır ve sık sık yaptıklarına pişman olur.

examples.target: Don't be {impulsive} with your money.
Her {impulsive} nature sometimes gets her into trouble.
examples.source: Dürtüsel yapısı bazen başını belaya sokuyor.

examples.target: The jury found the defendant {innocent}.
He looked at her with {innocent} eyes.
Children are born {innocent} of prejudice.
She was {innocent} of any wrongdoing.
She is a {loyal} friend who is always there for you.
examples.source: Her zaman yanınızda olan sadık bir arkadaş.

examples.target: Dogs are known for being {loyal} companions.
He stayed {loyal} to the company for thirty years.
examples.source: Otuz yıl boyunca şirkete bağlı kaldı.

examples.target: Being {loyal} means supporting people even when it is hard.
examples.source: Sadık olmak, zor zamanlarda bile insanları desteklemek demektir.

examples.target: He is {modest} about his achievements.
They live in a {modest} house on a quiet street.
examples.source: Sakin bir sokaktaki mütevazı bir evde yaşıyorlar.

examples.target: She wore a {modest} dress to the ceremony.
He earned a {modest} income as a teacher.
examples.source: Öğretmen olarak ölçülü bir gelir kazandı.

examples.target: You need to be {patient} when learning a new skill.
examples.source: Yeni bir beceri öğrenirken sabırlı olmanız gerekir.

examples.target: She is very {patient} with young children.
The teacher was {patient} while the students struggled.
Good things come to those who are {patient}.
She was {sympathetic} when she heard about his loss.
The manager was {sympathetic} to the employee's situation.
examples.source: Yönetici çalışanın durumuna karşı anlayışlı yaklaştı.

examples.target: He is a {sympathetic} character that readers like.
It helps to have a {sympathetic} listener when you are upset.
examples.source: Üzgün olduğunuzda anlayışlı bir dinleyiciye sahip olmak yardımcı olur.

examples.target: The Earth's {atmosphere} protects us from radiation.
The restaurant had a warm and cozy {atmosphere}.
examples.source: Restoranın sıcak ve rahat bir atmosferi vardı.

examples.target: The {atmosphere} at the concert was electric.
The city's {atmosphere} changes completely at night.
She studies {biology} at university.
{Biology} helps us understand how living things work.
examples.source: Biyoloji, canlıların nasıl işlediğini anlamamıza yardımcı olur.

examples.target: He got an A in {biology} last semester.
examples.source: Geçen dönem biyoloji dersinden A aldı.

examples.target: Marine {biology} studies life in the ocean.
Never mix unknown {chemical} substances.
The lab detected a {chemical} reaction in the sample.
examples.source: Laboratuvar numunede kimyasal bir reaksiyon tespit etti.

examples.target: She works in the {chemical} industry.
The spill caused a dangerous {chemical} leak.
examples.source: Sızıntı tehlikeli bir kimyasal kaçağına yol açtı.

examples.target: Scientists {classify} animals into different groups.
examples.source: Bilim insanları hayvanları farklı gruplara sınıflandırır.

examples.target: How would you {classify} this type of music?
The document was {classified} as confidential.
Librarians {classify} books by subject and author.
examples.source: Kütüphaneciler kitapları konusuna ve yazarına göre sınıflandırır.

examples.target: The students conducted a chemistry {experiment}.
The {experiment} proved the hypothesis was correct.
He decided to do an {experiment} in his kitchen.
examples.source: Mutfağında bir deney yapmaya karar verdi.

examples.target: She described the results of her {experiment}.
{Gravity} keeps the planets in orbit around the sun.
examples.source: Yerçekimi gezegenleri güneş etrafındaki yörüngede tutar.

examples.target: The apple fell because of {gravity}.
The {gravity} of the situation was clear to everyone.
She didn't understand the {gravity} of her mistake.
The samples were analyzed in the {laboratory}.
She spent long hours in the {laboratory} doing research.
examples.source: Araştırma yaparak laboratuvarda uzun saatler geçirdi.

examples.target: The {laboratory} is equipped with modern technology.
Students must wear gloves in the {laboratory}.
Scientists {observe} animal behavior in the wild.
examples.source: Bilim insanları doğadaki hayvan davranışlarını gözlemler.

examples.target: She {observed} the patient's symptoms closely.
He {observed} that the door was open.
Children learn by {observing} adults.
Dust {particles} floated in the air.
Scientists study subatomic {particles} in physics.
examples.source: Bilim insanları fizikte atom altı parçacıkları inceler.

examples.target: A tiny {particle} of glass was found in the sample.
examples.source: Numunede küçük bir cam parçacığı bulundu.

examples.target: Every {particle} of dust tells a story.
examples.source: Her toz zerreciği bir hikaye anlatır.

examples.target: {Physics} explains how the universe works.
She studied {physics} and mathematics at university.
Quantum {physics} is one of the most complex sciences.
examples.source: Kuantum fiziği en karmaşık bilimlerden biridir.

examples.target: The laws of {physics} apply everywhere in the universe.
examples.source: Fiziğin yasaları evrenin her yerinde geçerlidir.

examples.target: Do you have any {proof} that he was there?
examples.source: Orada olduğuna dair herhangi bir kanıtın var mı?

examples.target: The fingerprints were {proof} of his guilt.
The scientist provided {proof} for her theory.
examples.source: Bilim insanı teorisi için kanıt sundu.

examples.target: You need {proof} of identity to open a bank account.
examples.source: Banka hesabı açmak için kimlik belgesi gerekir.

examples.target: Darwin's {theory} of evolution changed science forever.
examples.source: Darwin'in evrim teorisi bilimi sonsuza kadar değiştirdi.

examples.target: That's just a {theory} — we don't have the facts yet.
examples.source: Bu sadece bir teori — henüz gerçeklere sahip değiliz.

examples.target: He developed a new {theory} about black holes.
examples.source: Kara delikler hakkında yeni bir teori geliştirdi.

examples.target: In {theory}, the plan sounds great.
The museum has rare butterfly {specimens}.
The doctor sent a blood {specimen} to the lab.
The geologist collected rock {specimens} from the site.
This {specimen} is the best example of the species.
examples.source: Bu örnek türün en iyi örneğidir.

examples.target: They {conducted} a survey among five hundred people.
examples.source: Beş yüz kişi arasında anket yürüttüler.

examples.target: She {conducted} the orchestra with great skill.
The company {conducted} safety checks every month.
examples.source: Şirket her ay güvenlik kontrolleri gerçekleştirdi.

examples.target: Please {conduct} yourself professionally at all times.
Her {reaction} to the news surprised everyone.
The chemical {reaction} produced heat and light.
examples.source: Kimyasal reaksiyon ısı ve ışık üretti.

examples.target: His {reaction} time was very fast.
The drug caused an allergic {reaction}.
examples.source: İlaç alerjik bir reaksiyona neden oldu.

examples.target: The company {announced} its new product line.
She {announced} her engagement at the party.
The teacher {announced} the exam date.
The government {announced} new economic measures.
Please {confirm} your booking by email.
The test {confirmed} that she was healthy.
Can you {confirm} the time of the meeting?
He {confirmed} the details before the trip.
They {corresponded} by letter for years.
Her story {corresponds} with what the witness said.
The numbers on the two lists do not {correspond}.
examples.source: İki listedeki rakamlar birbirine denk gelmiyor.

examples.target: She {corresponded} with researchers from abroad.
He was {criticized} for his poor decision.
It is easy to {criticize} but hard to do better.
examples.source: Eleştirmek kolaydır ama daha iyisini yapmak zordur.

examples.target: The teacher {criticized} the essay gently.
She {criticized} the government's new policy.
Can you {describe} what the thief looked like?
examples.source: Hırsızın nasıl göründüğünü tarif edebilir misin?

examples.target: She {described} the trip in detail.
Words cannot {describe} how beautiful it was.
examples.source: Kelimeler ne kadar güzel olduğunu tarif edemez.

examples.target: He {described} the process step by step.
They {discussed} the project over lunch.
Let's {discuss} this issue in the next meeting.
examples.source: Bu konuyu bir sonraki toplantıda görüşelim.

examples.target: The book {discusses} the causes of the war.
She {discussed} her concerns with the manager.
The teacher {emphasized} the importance of practice.
She {emphasized} that the deadline was firm.
I want to {emphasize} one key point.
The report {emphasizes} the need for change.
She found it hard to {express} her feelings.
He {expressed} his gratitude in a letter.
Art is one way to {express} yourself.
examples.source: Sanat, kendinizi ifade etmenin bir yoludur.

examples.target: Please {express} your thoughts clearly.
Please {inform} us of any changes.
examples.source: Lütfen herhangi bir değişikliği bize bildirin.

examples.target: She {informed} her boss that she would be late.
The website {informs} visitors about the rules.
examples.source: Web sitesi ziyaretçileri kurallar hakkında bilgilendirir.

examples.target: He was {informed} of the decision by email.
Did I {mention} that I passed my exam?
He didn't {mention} any problems.
She {mentioned} seeing him at the store.
The report doesn't {mention} this issue.
She {persuaded} him to join the club.
He {persuaded} the committee to accept his proposal.
examples.source: Komiteyi teklifini kabul etmeye ikna etti.

examples.target: It's hard to {persuade} someone who has made up their mind.
examples.source: Kararını vermiş birini ikna etmek zordur.

examples.target: The advertisement tries to {persuade} you to buy.
examples.source: Reklam sizi satın almaya ikna etmeye çalışıyor.

examples.target: She {proposed} a new solution to the problem.
He {proposed} to his girlfriend on the beach.
examples.source: Kız arkadaşına sahilde evlenme teklif etti.

examples.target: The committee {proposed} several changes to the law.
I {propose} that we start the meeting early.
Please {report} any suspicious activity.
examples.source: Lütfen şüpheli herhangi bir faaliyeti bildirin.

examples.target: The journalist {reported} from the conflict zone.
He {reported} the accident to the police.
The news station {reports} on events around the world.
examples.source: Haber istasyonu dünyanın dört bir yanındaki olayları haberleştiriyor.

examples.target: Can you {suggest} a good restaurant nearby?
examples.source: Yakında iyi bir restoran önerir misin?

examples.target: She {suggested} meeting at three o'clock.
The evidence {suggests} he was not involved.
I {suggest} reviewing the plan one more time.
examples.source: Planı bir kez daha gözden geçirmenizi öneririm.

examples.target: She {translated} the document from French to English.
Can you {translate} this phrase for me?
examples.source: Bu ifadeyi benim için çevirir misin?

examples.target: The book has been {translated} into thirty languages.
It is difficult to {translate} humor across cultures.
At high {altitude}, the air is thinner.
The plane flew at an {altitude} of ten thousand meters.
examples.source: Uçak on bin metre irtifada uçtu.

examples.target: She felt dizzy at the high {altitude}.
The mountain village is at an {altitude} of two thousand meters.
examples.source: Dağ köyü iki bin metre yüksekliğindedir.

examples.target: The boats were anchored in the sheltered {bay}.
The city was built around a beautiful natural {bay}.
examples.source: Şehir güzel bir doğal körfez etrafında kurulmuştu.

examples.target: We swam in the calm waters of the {bay}.
The {bay} was full of colorful fishing boats.
Bats live in dark {caves}.
The explorers discovered a large {cave} in the cliff.
examples.source: Kaşifler kayalıkta büyük bir mağara keşfetti.

examples.target: Ancient paintings were found in the {cave}.
She explored the {cave} with a flashlight.
The {climate} in the tropics is hot and humid.
{Climate} change is a global challenge.
She moved to a warmer {climate} for health reasons.
examples.source: Sağlık nedenleriyle daha sıcak bir iklime taşındı.

examples.target: The city's {climate} is mild throughout the year.
Africa is the second largest {continent}.
She has traveled to four {continents}.
Europe and Asia share the same {continent}.
examples.source: Avrupa ve Asya aynı kıtayı paylaşır.

examples.target: Different {continents} have different climates.
The Sahara is the world's largest hot {desert}.
examples.source: Sahra, dünyanın en büyük sıcak çölüdür.

examples.target: Few plants can survive in a {desert}.
examples.source: Çölde çok az bitki hayatta kalabilir.

examples.target: The temperature in the {desert} drops at night.
They crossed the {desert} on camelback.
The {glacier} is slowly melting due to climate change.
examples.source: Buzul, iklim değişikliği nedeniyle yavaşça eriyor.

examples.target: They hiked across the ancient {glacier}.
The {glacier} carved the valley over thousands of years.
examples.source: Buzul binlerce yıl boyunca vadiyi şekillendirdi.

examples.target: Scientists study {glaciers} to understand climate history.
examples.source: Bilim insanları iklim tarihini anlamak için buzulları inceler.

examples.target: The ships rested in the calm {harbor}.
Fishing boats returned to the {harbor} at dawn.
The town grew around its natural {harbor}.
The storm made the {harbor} unsafe for vessels.
examples.source: Fırtına limanı gemiler için tehlikeli hale getirdi.

examples.target: The {island} is surrounded by clear blue water.
They spent a week on a small tropical {island}.
examples.source: Küçük bir tropik adada bir hafta geçirdiler.

examples.target: Japan is made up of over six thousand {islands}.
examples.source: Japonya altı binden fazla adadan oluşmaktadır.

examples.target: The {island} became a popular tourist destination.
examples.source: Ada popüler bir turistik destinasyon haline geldi.

examples.target: Many rare species live in the Amazon {jungle}.
examples.source: Amazon ormanında pek çok nadir tür yaşamaktadır.

examples.target: They got lost in the thick {jungle}.
The {jungle} is home to thousands of species.
examples.source: Orman binlerce türe ev sahipliği yapıyor.

examples.target: Explorers have mapped much of the world's {jungles}.
examples.source: Kaşifler dünyanın ormanlarının büyük bölümünü haritalandırdı.

examples.target: Mount Everest is the highest {mountain} in the world.
examples.source: Everest Dağı dünyanın en yüksek dağıdır.

examples.target: They climbed the {mountain} in five hours.
The {mountain} village was covered in snow.
Living near a {mountain} offers beautiful views.
examples.source: Bir dağın yakınında yaşamak güzel manzaralar sunar.

examples.target: The {ocean} covers more than seventy percent of Earth.
examples.source: Okyanus, Dünya'nın yüzde yetmişinden fazlasını kaplar.

examples.target: They sailed across the Atlantic {ocean}.
Plastic waste is polluting our {oceans}.
The {ocean} is home to countless species.
examples.source: Okyanus sayısız türe ev sahipliği yapıyor.

examples.target: Italy is shaped like a {peninsula}.
The {peninsula} is surrounded by the sea on three sides.
The ancient city was built on a rocky {peninsula}.
examples.source: Antik şehir kayalık bir yarımada üzerine kurulmuştu.

examples.target: The Korean {peninsula} has a complex history.
examples.source: Kore yarımadasının karmaşık bir tarihi vardır.

examples.target: The horses ran freely across the open {plain}.
Wheat grows well in the fertile {plains}.
The {plain} stretched as far as the eye could see.
Many ancient civilizations developed on {plains}.
examples.source: Pek çok antik uygarlık ovalarda gelişti.

examples.target: The river flows through the {valley}.
The {valley} was surrounded by steep mountains.
They built the village in a sheltered {valley}.
The {valley} was green and full of life in spring.
The museum is full of {ancient} artifacts.
They explored {ancient} ruins in Rome.
The {ancient} city was built thousands of years ago.
examples.source: Antik şehir binlerce yıl önce inşa edildi.

examples.target: {Ancient} traditions are still practiced in the village.
What is the {current} situation?
She is the {current} president of the club.
The {current} version has several improvements.
He is not happy with his {current} job.
Water is {essential} for all living things.
Good communication is {essential} in any team.
She packed only the {essential} items for the trip.
examples.source: Yolculuk için yalnızca temel eşyalarını yanına aldı.

examples.target: It is {essential} to follow the safety rules.
The weather conditions were {extreme}.
She avoids taking {extreme} risks.
He went to {extreme} lengths to prove his point.
examples.source: Fikrini kanıtlamak için aşırı uzunluklara gitti.

examples.target: {Extreme} sports require great physical fitness.
examples.source: Aşırı sporlar çok iyi bir fiziksel kondisyon gerektirir.

examples.target: She is a {frequent} visitor to the library.
{Frequent} exercise keeps you healthy.
He makes {frequent} trips to the city.
The bus runs {frequently} during rush hours.
examples.source: Otobüs yoğun saatlerde sık sık geliyor.

examples.target: Climate change is a {global} problem.
The company has a {global} presence.
The internet connects people on a {global} scale.
examples.source: İnternet insanları küresel ölçekte birbirine bağlıyor.

examples.target: We need {global} cooperation to address these issues.
examples.source: Bu sorunları çözmek için küresel iş birliğine ihtiyaç var.

examples.target: The situation requires {immediate} action.
There was no {immediate} danger.
She had an {immediate} response to the treatment.
The manager gave an {immediate} answer.
My {initial} reaction was surprise.
The {initial} plan was to finish in two weeks.
After the {initial} shock, she felt calm.
The {initial} results look very promising.
examples.source: İlk sonuçlar çok umut verici görünüyor.

examples.target: It was {obvious} that he was lying.
The answer seems {obvious} now.
She made her displeasure {obvious}.
There is an {obvious} difference between the two.
examples.source: İkisi arasında belirgin bir fark var.

examples.target: She wants a {permanent} job, not a temporary one.
examples.source: Geçici değil, kalıcı bir iş istiyor.

examples.target: The {permanent} damage cannot be undone.
He got a {permanent} tattoo on his arm.
The company offered her a {permanent} position.
examples.source: Şirket ona daimi bir pozisyon teklif etti.

examples.target: The measurement must be {precise}.
She gave a {precise} description of the suspect.
examples.source: Şüpheli hakkında kesin bir tarif verdi.

examples.target: His {precise} instructions left no room for error.
examples.source: Kesin talimatları hata için hiç yer bırakmadı.

examples.target: At that {precise} moment, the phone rang.
The winner was chosen at {random}.
A {random} sample of people were asked for their opinion.
examples.source: Rastgele bir grup insana görüşleri soruldu.

examples.target: The numbers appeared in {random} order.
It was a {random} coincidence that they met.
There has been a {significant} improvement in her work.
The discovery was {significant} for science.
examples.source: Keşif bilim açısından büyük önem taşıyordu.

examples.target: A {significant} number of people attended the event.
The meeting had a {significant} impact on the project.
examples.source: Toplantının proje üzerinde önemli bir etkisi oldu.

examples.target: Can you give a more {specific} example?
examples.source: Daha belirli bir örnek verebilir misin?

examples.target: The instructions were very {specific}.
He asked a {specific} question about the topic.
examples.source: Konu hakkında belirli bir soru sordu.

examples.target: Each job requires {specific} skills.
The stars were {visible} on the clear night.
The damage was {visible} from across the street.
She made a {visible} effort to stay calm.
examples.source: Sakin kalmak için gözle görülür bir çaba gösterdi.

examples.target: The results of the treatment were {visible} within a week.
examples.source: Tedavinin sonuçları bir hafta içinde görünür oldu.
